_comment: spec-v50 §3.4: the only persistent-storage keys Sophie is permitted to write. Any localStorage.setItem(...) / sessionStorage.setItem(...) in the codebase must pass a string literal whose value is in `keys` below. The service worker's Cache Storage namespaces are listed in `cacheNamespacePrefixes`: actual cache names like `sophiewell-shell-${BUILD_HASH}` are matched by prefix.
